websearch.notes: Checked OpenAI, Anthropic, Apple, Disney, Sony, Netflix, Waymo, Stripe, Airbnb, Uber, Snap, Salesforce, European/Canada/Tokyo/Singapore markets. Only new-looking role was Disney VP Software Engineering (Glendale) — confirmed via WebFetch as the existing Addressable Advertising role (already rejected for ad-delivery domain mismatch). Waymo Developer AI reconfirmed CLOSED. No other new qualifying roles.
